cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. Let's start by keeping track of each person's gift step by step. First, the initial setup is: - Alice has a brown present. - Bob has an orange ball. - Claire has a purple present. - Dave has a yellow present. - Eve has a white present. Now, the swaps happen one after another.
